news.headline: Fed's Daly when asked if there will be more rate cuts this year: The world is uncertain.
Fed's Daly: No reason to be discouraged about inflation progress, but taking longer than anyone wants.
Fed's Daly: GDP growth and the labor market are solid.
Bitwise donating $150,000 from BITB profits to Bitcoin open-source developers; 10% of gross profits pledged annually.
news.summary: Bitwise Asset Management, a $12 billion crypto asset manager based in San Francisco, has revealed its inaugural donation to bitcoin open-source developers. These developers are a worldwide group of volunteer programmers who work to safeguard and enhance the Bitcoin network. The company has committed to donating 10% of the gross profits from the Bitwise Bitcoin ETF (BITB) on an annual basis to assist in this vital endeavor. The first donation amounts to $150,000, marking the initiation of Bitwise's ongoing support for the developers. The donation is set to increase in subsequent years as the profitability of the Bitwise Bitcoin ETF grows.

news.headline: Fluor Corp's Q4 earnings miss as revenue hits $4.26B (11.5% growth) and adjusted EPS drops to 48 cents from 68 cents.
news.summary: Fluor Corp (NYSE:FLR) is experiencing a decrease in shares following its fourth-quarter earnings report, which fell short of street expectations. The company saw a revenue increase of 11.5% year over year, reaching $4.26 billion, missing the anticipated $4.42 billion. Adjusted EPS decreased to 48 cents from 68 cents compared to the previous year, also below the expected 77 cents. Sales by segment were: Urban Solutions at $1.99 billion (+40.8% YoY), Energy Solutions at $1.52 billion (+6.9% YoY), Mission Solutions at $654 million (+1.24% YoY), and Others at $87 million. Fluor reported a total segment profit of $206 million, up from $85 million the previous year, with the margin expanding 261 basis points to 4.8%. Net earnings from core operations stood at $1.84 billion, a significant increase from $72 million in the previous year.

news.headline: Solana's meme coin sector faces scrutiny after LIBRA's drop. TRUMP's launch stirred a liquidity shift in the market.
news.summary: The meme coin sector within Solana's ecosystem, represented by SOL, is facing renewed scrutiny due to a sharp decline in LIBRA, another cryptocurrency. Galaxy Research pointed out that the downfall of LIBRA is likely to undermine confidence in speculative assets based on Solana, which have been struggling since the launch of the TRUMP token earlier this year. This new token has significantly impacted liquidity within the meme coin market, contributing to increased market volatility. The recent price increases in Solana were mainly fueled by the demand for assets denominated in SOL, particularly meme coins. The rapid rise and fall of LIBRA may potentially decrease investor interest in Solana-based assets, as observed by Galaxy Research following the market trends. This development denotes a challenge for the meme coin market within the cryptocurrency realm.

news.headline: US stocks are mixed, with Dow falling 0.24% to 44,440.80, NASDAQ rising 0.26% to 20,078.31, S&P 500 gaining 0.11% to 6,121.11. NY Empire State Manufacturing Index rose by 18.3 points to a reading of +5.7 in February.
news.summary: This morning, U.S. stocks showed a mixed performance, with the Dow Jones index dropping approximately 100 points on Tuesday. At the market opening, the Dow was down by 0.24% at 44,440.80, while the NASDAQ experienced a 0.26% increase to reach 20,078.31. The S&P 500 also saw a rise of 0.11% to hit 6,121.11. Notably, information technology shares surged by 0.7%, whereas consumer staples shares declined by 0.6% during trading on Tuesday. The NY Empire State Manufacturing Index exhibited significant growth, increasing by 18.3 points to +5.7 in February, surpassing the market predictions of -1. In positive news, Healthcare Triangle Inc (NASDAQ) saw its equities trading up. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Trez Capital reports Q4 2024 with over $5.7B AUM, funding $20.5B CRE loans. Strategic growth in Texas, Alberta, and Arizona.
news.summary: Trez Capital, a leader in North American commercial real estate investments, reported its Q4 2024 results with assets under management surpassing $5.7 billion CAD. The firm has funded over $20.5 billion CAD in commercial real estate loans since inception. Trez Capital highlighted resilient performance, strategic leadership advancements, and continued growth amid an evolving market landscape. The firm closed Q4 2024 with stable fund performance, strategic portfolio shifts, and expansion into high-growth markets like Texas, Alberta, and Arizona. The debt funds maintained stable monthly distributions, benefiting from a lower interest rate environment, while new financings in industrial and residential projects reinforced portfolio resilience. Trez Capital also expanded its footprint in high-growth U.S. markets like Texas.

news.headline: Fed's Daly: The US economy is in a good place.
Siborg Systems launches new calibration boards for tweezers LCR-meters, expands measurement range below 1pF/10nH.
news.summary: In Waterloo, Ontario, on February 18, 2025, it has been observed that tweezer-style LCR meters have become increasingly popular. Despite their rise in popularity, a prevalent issue faced by all models is the existence of parasitic inductance and capacitance within the unshielded test leads. This limitation hinders the precise measurement of various electrical properties.

news.headline: Business Travel Accident Insurance Market valued at $3.2B in 2023; projected to reach $26.1B by 2033 at 23.3% CAGR, per report.
news.summary: The article discusses a report by Allied Market Research on the global business travel accident insurance market. The market was valued at $3.2 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $26.1 billion by 2033, with a compound annual growth rate of 23.3% from 2024 to 2033. Factors driving this growth include the increase in global business travel, awareness of travel risks, and corporate focus on employee well-being. The market is also benefiting from technological advancements and corporate travel policy enhancements, although challenges such as high insurance costs and lack of awareness may hinder growth.

news.headline: Cellar Beast Winehouse wins six awards at 2025 AFWC, solidifying reputation for quality wines.
news.summary: In Andreas, Pennsylvania on February 18, 2025, Cellar Beast Winehouse, a rising star in the boutique winery sector, achieved significant recognition by winning six prestigious awards at the 2025 American Fine Wine Competition (AFWC). This accolade enhances the winery's standing for crafting top-tier wines.

news.headline: Bulleit Frontier Whiskey releases its first Bottled-in-Bond bourbon, distilled in 2017 at Bulleit Distilling Company, Shelbyville.
news.summary: Shelbyville, Kentucky - On February 18, 2025, Bulleit Frontier Whiskey introduced its inaugural Bottled-in-Bond bourbon produced at the Bulleit Distilling Company in Shelbyville, Kentucky. This marks the brand's debut within the bonded whiskey category. This launch is a significant milestone for Bulleit, as it is the first time they have released a bourbon that is both distilled and aged on-site. The bourbon is a testament to Bulleit's commitment to craftsmanship and quality.

news.headline: Comar wins Silver Medal for sustainability excellence from EcoVadis, a top provider of primary packaging & dispensing products.
news.summary: Voorhees, New Jersey - On February 18, 2025, Comar, a renowned contract manufacturing partner for global healthcare firms specializing in primary packaging and dispensing products, received recognition with a Silver Medal from EcoVadis. This accolade highlights Comar's commitment to sustainability and responsible business practices.

news.headline: Lucky partners with Ulta Beauty to enhance beauty shopping experience, connecting brands' DTC sites with Ulta's  inventory in real-time.
news.summary: Miami-based Lucky has recently partnered with Ulta Beauty, the leading specialty beauty retailer in the US, with an intention to transform the beauty shopping experience. This collaboration aims to enable beauty brands to synchronize their Direct-To-Consumer websites and marketing efforts with Ulta Beauty's vast in-store inventory in real-time. Such a move is set to revolutionize the way customers explore and purchase beauty items. This initiative will bring a significant change by offering a seamless shopping experience for customers surfing their favorite beauty brand's marketing platforms.

news.headline: Cummins names Bonnie Fetch and Shon Wright to key roles on the leadership team effective March 15. CEO Jennifer Rumsey praises their dedication to the company's strategy and values.
news.summary: In Indianapolis, Cummins Inc. has recently revealed significant updates to its Leadership Team, set to take effect on March 15. Jennifer Rumsey, Chair and CEO of Cummins, expressed satisfaction in the strength and competency of the company's leaders as they strive to drive forward the Destination Zero initiative and achieve remarkable outcomes for customers and the business. Emphasizing Cummins' dedication to its core values, Rumsey proudly announced the promotion of two seasoned leaders within the organization.

news.headline: Analysts suggest Ethereum may be hitting a low. Its price pattern resembles 2019-2020, preceding a 2,550% surge. Will history repeat in 2025?
news.summary: The current price of Ethereum (ETH) is displaying a pattern similar to the one seen during its 2019-2020 cycle, which preceded a staggering 2,550% price rally. This raises the question of whether history could repeat itself in 2025.

news.headline: Eagle Point Software is now an official SOLIDWORKS Solution Partner, emphasizing commitment to delivering learning solutions.
news.summary: In Dubuque, Iowa on February 18, 2025, Eagle Point Software, a prominent provider of Learning Management Systems (LMS) and eLearning solutions, revealed its acknowledgment as a SOLIDWORKS Solution Partner. This recognition underscores Eagle Point's dedication to providing high-quality learning experiences.

news.headline: Spectrum Reach celebrates 5th anniversary of Pay It Forward Initiative by investing $3.8M in ad campaigns for small businesses; Total investment over 5 years exceeds $50M.
news.summary: In 2025, a program has been established to offer $3.8 million worth of free ad campaigns to small businesses across the United States. Over the span of five years, a total investment of more than $50 million will be allocated for this initiative. Spectrum Reach, the advertising sales division of Charter Communications, Inc., unveiled this fifth-year program on February 18, 2025.

news.headline: ROGA launches Know Your Play campaign to educate college-aged students on responsible gaming and financial literacy.
news.summary: Launching in McLean, Virginia on February 18, 2025, the Know Your Play campaign is a collaborative effort aimed at offering college-aged students education on responsible gaming and financial literacy. Spearheaded by the Responsible Online Gaming Association (ROGA), this initiative seeks to equip individuals with the necessary tools to make informed decisions.

news.headline: Inventor from Indiana creates FoamX Pro to reduce expanded polystyrene foam waste in landfills.Characters: 100
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on February 18, 2025, an inventor from McCordsville, Ind., shared their motivation behind creating the FoamX Pro machine. The inventor aimed to address the issue of expanded polystyrene foam taking up excessive space in landfills. Through their innovative design, the FoamX Pro effectively breaks down the foam material, leading to a reduction in landfill waste. This solution presents a promising way to minimize the amount of expanded polystyrene foam ending up in landfills, contributing to environmental sustainability.

news.headline: Global interactive kiosk market to reach $46.53B revenue by 2031, growing at 6.33% CAGR - Verified Market Research.
news.summary: Leading business intelligence and market analysis firm Verified Market Research® has recently unveiled a detailed report on the "Interactive Kiosk Market Size and Forecast." This comprehensive analysis offers valuable insights into the market trends, growth projections, and competitive landscape of the interactive kiosk industry. The report covers key aspects such as market size, trends, and forecasted growth figures. This authoritative report is a valuable resource for industry players, investors, and stakeholders looking to understand the current market dynamics and future prospects in the interactive kiosk sector.

news.headline: Constellation Real Estate Group launches Constellation Data Labs to enhance property data & analytics.
news.summary: Constellation Real Estate Group has revealed the establishment of Constellation Data Labs, a new venture based in Laguna Beach, Calif., unveiled on Feb. 18, 2025. This business will focus on data and analytics services for the property sector to further enhance their growth prospects. The new initiative aims to capitalize on the current success and drive cross-industry expansion. This move signifies a significant development in the company's strategy and commitment to leveraging data-driven solutions.

news.headline: Dow Jones slips while S&P 500 aims for record high; Nvidia surges near buy point. Market update from Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: On Tuesday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a decline, while the S&P 500 index was on track to potentially reach a new record high. Nvidia's stock saw a significant rally, approaching a potential new buy point. This information highlights the contrasting performance in the stock market with the Dow Jones dropping, but the S&P 500 showing strength. Nvidia's stock's surge near a key buy point indicates positive market sentiment towards the company.

news.headline: Europe's military expenditure rise amid Trump-Europe discord: Pan-European Stoxx 600 hits record high; investors boost defense stocks.
news.summary: A surge in trading activity has propelled the Pan-European Stoxx 600 index to a new peak, with investors anticipating a rise in military expenditures by European governments. This trend reflects growing confidence in the market, as evidenced by the record-breaking performance of the index.

news.headline: OpenTug focuses on BargeOS suite with AI upgrades for 2025. Enhancements in data reporting; shifting from marketplace roots.
news.summary: Today, OpenTug, a marine logistics platform, has announced significant advancements in its capabilities with the expansion of BargeOS. The platform, focused on improving freight efficiency on inland and coastal waters, is transitioning from its marketplace origins. The developments include improved data reporting features. These strides mark a shift towards enhancing the platform's performance and offerings in the marine logistics sector. This update comes as part of OpenTug's commitment to innovation and efficiency within the industry as of February 18, 2025.

news.headline: Avangrid restored power to around 100,000 customers in NY, CT, and Maine after a winter storm. Crews worked in challenging conditions.
news.summary: In Orange, Connecticut, Avangrid, Inc., a prominent energy company belonging to the Iberdrola Group, along with its subsidiaries in New York, Connecticut, and Maine, collaborated to restore power to about 100,000 customers following a prolonged winter storm in the northeastern United States. Despite facing freezing temperatures, powerful winds, and icy conditions, crews in the three states worked diligently to rapidly and securely restore power to numerous residential customers and businesses.

news.headline: ProAmpac partners with UDF to boost food-to-go sales through HandRap™ packaging. Improves customer appeal with innovative design.
news.summary: In Cincinnati, flexible packaging leader ProAmpac has partnered with United Dairy Farmers (UDF) to enhance its fresh food-to-go offerings using ProAmpac's HandRap™. This collaboration resulted in a significant increase in sales and better customer satisfaction for UDF. Looking to improve product presentation, UDF opted for HandRap's clear film wrap and recyclable carton board design. The partnership proved successful, boosting sales for UDF and enhancing customer appeal.

news.headline: Plant scientist Giles Oldroyd, PhD, named President of Danforth Plant Science Center in St. Louis following international search.Characters: 119
news.summary: On February 18, 2025 in St. Louis, the Donald Danforth Plant Science Center announced the appointment of Giles Oldroyd, PhD, as its new President following a global selection process. Dr. Oldroyd, a distinguished plant geneticist, is known for his research on symbiotic relationships in plants. This decision signals a significant move for the center as it looks to leverage Dr. Oldroyd's expertise to further research in the field.

news.headline: Liquid Web ranked #1 as Dedicated Hosting Provider in 2025 HostAdvice Awards for SMBs, recognized by HostAdvice.
news.summary: Atlanta, on February 18, 2025: Liquid Web, a top provider offering dedicated servers, WordPress, VPS, GPU, and cloud hosting solutions tailored to small to medium-sized businesses, has secured the title of Best Dedicated Hosting Provider for 2025. HostAdvice, a renowned platform in the industry, bestowed this prestigious recognition upon Liquid Web.

news.headline: Isle Blue adds exclusive villas in Palm Springs for a sophisticated experience, expanding its luxury portfolio.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina on February 18, 2025, Isle Blue, a prominent company specializing in luxury villa rentals worldwide, is introducing a heightened level of elegance to Palm Springs through the unveiling of its premium villa selection. Renowned for offering top-tier properties across the Caribbean, Europe, and other regions, Isle Blue is expanding its offerings to include Palm Springs, catering to the upscale clientele seeking exceptional accommodations.

news.headline: Barite industry report offers analysis & forecast till 2034 on manufacturing, consumption, trade & price with detailed data.
news.summary: Dublin, The market review report "Barite World, Regions, and Countries Market Review 2019-2024 and Forecast to 2034" is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. This comprehensive report provides data on global, regional, and national markets. It includes analysis from 2019-2024 and forecasts up to 2034 regarding supply and demand, pricing trends, and impacts on downstream industries. The report offers detailed insights through high-quality tables, figures, and textual content. This information aims to provide a clear understanding of the national and regional barite markets.

news.headline: Lutetium-177 market to hit USD 5374M by 2030, growth driven by nuclear therapy demand. Valued at USD 1564M in 2023.
news.summary: The market for Lutetium-177 (Lu-177) is divided into two types: non-carrier-added and carrier-added, with applications primarily in nuclear therapy and other fields. As of February 18, 2025, in Bangalore, India, the global Lu-177 market had a value of USD 1564 million in 2023. It is expected to grow significantly and reach USD [specify anticipated value].

Fed's Daly does not comment on monetary policy, or the economy in prepared remarks calling for tailoring bank regulations.
Crypto Fear & Greed Index: 47/100 - Neutral.
HMR presents XoMotion™ exoskeleton at Invictus Games 2025, highlighting commitment to mobility. (Words: 84)
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 18, 2025, Human in Motion Robotics (HMR) unveiled its innovative XoMotion™ exoskeleton at the Invictus Games 2025 Closing Ceremony. This event highlighted HMR's commitment to enhancing the mobility of individuals facing challenges. The exoskeleton's technology aims to revolutionize the lives of many, embodying HMR's dedication to improving quality of life.

news.headline: Fusion Connect's US-based team achieved a record +667% NPS increase in 2024, offering top POTS replacement solution.
news.summary: A significant surge of +667% in Net Promoter Score (NPS) was achieved in 2024 by Fusion Connect's all-American Services team, contributing to an unprecedented level of customer satisfaction. The company, a subsidiary of Morgan Stanley, renowned for its connectivity and communications services, based in Atlanta, has made notable strides in enhancing the overall customer experience.

news.headline: Chinese stocks saw $2 bln of inflows in January, and ex-China equities post $11.5 bln of outflows - IIF.
VRU market to hit USD 2.1B by 2031, up from USD 1.4B in 2024, with 5.9% CAGR due to environmental regulations.
news.summary: The market for Vapor Recovery Units (VRU) is expected to expand significantly, with a projected increase from USD 1.4 billion in 2024 to USD 2.1 billion by 2031. This represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of around 5.9%. The rise in demand is being driven by the growing emphasis on environmental regulations and the necessity for emission control within the oil industry.

news.headline: Scientific Games chosen as technology partner for New Mexico Lottery with new 10-year contract for gaming systems.
news.summary: An industry-leading company has secured a significant contract in New Mexico. Scientific Games has been chosen as the exclusive provider for the New Mexico Lottery, securing a 10-year deal for their cutting-edge gaming systems technology. This partnership marks an important milestone for the company and the lottery, solidifying their collaboration for the foreseeable future. Additionally, Scientific Games has expanded their partnership with Scratchers, enhancing their presence and offerings in the state. This development is set to bring forth new opportunities for both parties and further establish their standing in the gaming industry.

news.headline: By 2031, Unmanned Ground Vehicles (UGV) Market to reach $14.88 Billion globally, with 14.22% CAGR - Verified Market Research.
news.summary: Verified Market Research®, a reputable firm specializing in business intelligence and market analysis, has just unveiled a detailed report on the "Unmanned Ground Vehicles (UGV) Market Size and Forecast." This significant report offers crucial insights for the defense industry.

news.headline: Inventor from Ohio creates XTRA MILE FLUID RESERVE & REFILLS SYSTEM for windshield washer fluid refill.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh, on February 18, 2025, an inventor from Bedford Heights, Ohio, shared details about the creation of the XTRA MILE FLUID RESERVE & REFILLS SYSTEM. The inventor aimed to provide a convenient solution for refilling washer fluid in case the main tank runs out. This innovative system is designed to allow for easy and quick replenishment of washer fluid.

news.headline: Location-based Entertainment Market projected to reach $15.33 billion by 2029, from $5.47 billion in 2024 - MarketsandMarkets™.
news.summary: A recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ projects that the Location-based Entertainment Market, which was valued at USD 5.47 billion in 2024, is anticipated to reach USD 15.33 billion by 2029. This signifies a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 22.9%. The LBE market pertains to entertainment experiences tied to a specific location and is expected to experience significant growth in the coming years.

news.headline: HFR to exhibit private 5G solutions at MWC 2025 in Barcelona, with largest market share in Korea. KOSDAQ: 230240.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, on February 18, 2025, HFR, Inc. (KOSDAQ: 230240) revealed its involvement in MWC 2025, occurring in Barcelona, Spain, from March 3 to 6, 2025. The company, a prominent supplier of Private 5G networks, currently dominates the Korean market with the highest share as of December.

news.headline: Behavox Intelligent Archive saw 300% growth in Q4 2024, reflecting demand for compliance archiving solutions.
news.summary: Behavox, a leading AI insights company, has reported a remarkable 300% quarter-over-quarter growth in its Intelligent Archive solution for the fourth quarter of 2024. This exceptional achievement highlights the increasing need for advanced, scalable, and customer-focused compliance archiving solutions as businesses globally shift away from traditional providers. The success in this quarter underscores the growing demand for innovative solutions in the market.

news.headline: Limitless Franchise Growth announces 4 new partnerships for Q1 2025: All Dogs Unleashed, ISI Elite Training, Plunge House, and Project LeanNation.
news.summary: A leading franchising company, Limitless Franchise Growth (LFG) based in Scottsdale, Arizona, is set to welcome All Dogs Unleashed, ISI® Elite Training, Plunge House®, and Project LeanNation as its new brand partners. This announcement was made on February 18, 2025. LFG is known for its progressive approach in the franchising industry and is excited to expand its portfolio with these additions. This move signifies the company's commitment to growth and innovation.

news.headline: Clinical data analytics market poised to reach $614.7 billion by 2034, from $15.5 billion in 2023, driven by chronic diseases and tech advancements.
news.summary: The global clinical data analytics market was valued at $15.5 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $614.7 billion by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 39.7%. This growth is driven by the rise in chronic diseases and the adoption of advanced technologies in healthcare. Cloud computing and AI-based analytics play a crucial role in revolutionizing healthcare, enabling secure management and analysis of patient data. Challenges include high costs for clinical data solutions, potentially hindering adoption in certain regions. Key players in the market include IBM Watson Health, Optum, Cerner Corporation, Epic Systems, McKesson, SAS Institute, and Oracle Health, all based in the USA.

news.headline: Inner Haven Wellness in Madison and Neenah, Wisconsin launches new adult virtual Partial Hospitalization Program (PHP) & expands services.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in Madison, Wisconsin, Inner Haven Wellness disclosed the rollout of an adult virtual Partial Hospitalization Program (PHP). This esteemed eating disorder treatment provider, known for its programs in Madison and Neenah, Wisconsin, is now offering this new program to cater to the needs of adults. The expansion of services showcases the commitment of Inner Haven Wellness to provide comprehensive care for individuals struggling with eating disorders.

news.headline: Berlin Heals Holding AG raises over 7M CHF to initiate studies for less invasive heart failure therapy with C-MIC device.
news.summary: A MedTech startup based in Zug, Switzerland, called Berlin Heals Holding AG, announced on February 18, 2025, that they have created a revolutionary therapy for heart failure. The company's product, known as C-MIC, is an electronic device that has shown promising results in patient trials. As a late-stage startup, Berlin Heals Holding AG is at the forefront of innovation in the MedTech industry.
